notes: Refresh the live generated-derived inventory with ./scripts/llm/export-context.sh --write.
Keep curated business/domain context in automation/context/project-map.md.
Use docs/agent/architecture-map.md as the project-owned bridge from change scenario to likely code paths.
Use docs/agent/codex-workflows.md as the canonical Codex workflow guide after the first router step.
Use docs/agent/operator-local-runbook.md as the project-owned bridge for operator-local contour decisions.
Use docs/agent/runtime-quickstart.md as the short runtime digest before reading the full env contract.
Use automation/context/project-delta-hints.json to declare stable customization selectors and automation/context/project-delta-hotspots.generated.md as the generated-derived bridge.
Use automation/context/hotspots-summary.generated.md as the compact onboarding route before diving into raw inventory.
Use automation/context/runtime-support-matrix.md as the checked-in runtime truth before trusting local-private profiles.
When src/cf/Configuration.xml exists, configuration.name must not stay empty.
Generated-derived artifacts must exclude local-private runtime profiles and machine-specific Codex overrides.
